violations.finding: Direct python3 call without venv activation: exec python3 "$PY_SCRIPT" --session-id "$SESSION_ID"
violations.recommendation: Activate venv before calling python: source "$SCRIPT_DIR/../venv/bin/activate" 2>/dev/null || source "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.venv/bin/activate" 2>/dev/null; then use 'python' instead of 'python3'

violations.finding: Direct python3 call without venv activation: exec python3 "$PY_SCRIPT" "$@"
violations.recommendation: Activate venv before calling python: source "$SCRIPT_DIR/../venv/bin/activate" 2>/dev/null || source "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.venv/bin/activate" 2>/dev/null; then use 'python' instead of 'python3'
